page_title: Attack on Titan: TV Anime Screenplay Collection 2
text:
is the second compilation of the scripts of the Attack on Titan anime, written by Yasuko Kobayashi, Hiroshi Seko and Noboru Takagi. It contains the scripts for episodes fourteen to twenty-five, as well as the scripts for OVAs 2, 3, 4, and 5.

Table of Contents

#14 - Can't Look into His Eyes Yet 
#15 - Special Operations Squad
#16 - What Needs to be Done Now
#17 - Female Titan
#18 - Forest of Giant Trees
#19 - Bite
#20 - Erwin Smith
#21 - Crushing Blow
#22 - The Defeated
#23 - Smile
#24 - Mercy
#25 - Wall
#13 - Primal Desire
#3.25 - A Sudden Visitor
#3.75 - Distress
#0.5A - A Choice with No Regrets: Part One
#0.5B - A Choice with No Regrets: Part Two
